title: campanula persicifolia var. pumila
intro: Campanula persicifolia var. pumila, also known as dwarf bellflower, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Campanula persicifolia var. pumila include wound healing, reducing fever, and relieving respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Campanula persicifolia var. pumila can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to exploit its health benefits and medicinal properties.
